data.title: Bitcoin Nodes Signal Support for BIP-110 Amid Community Debate
data.description:
The number of Bitcoin nodes indicating support for Bitcoin Improvement Proposal 110 (BIP-110) has increased to 2.38%. According to Cointelegraph, 583 out of 24,481 nodes are currently running BIP-110, with Bitcoin Knots being the primary node software implementation for this temporary soft fork. BIP-110 aims to limit the size of transaction outputs to 34 bytes and cap the OP_RETURN data limit to 83 bytes. This temporary measure is set to last for one year, with the possibility of extension or modification thereafter, as detailed on the proposal’s GitHub page.

The OP_RETURN script code, which allows users to embed arbitrary data, has been a contentious topic within the Bitcoin community, especially following the release of Bitcoin Core version 30. This latest upgrade of the widely used Bitcoin node software removed the OP_RETURN limit, which had been capped at 83 bytes. The change, introduced through a controversial pull request first proposed in April 2025, faced significant opposition from the Bitcoin community. The update went live in October 2025, leading to criticism that removing the arbitrary data limit could encourage spam on the Bitcoin ledger.

Critics argue that the increase in arbitrary data raises the storage costs of running a Bitcoin node, potentially leading to greater centralization of the network. Unlike high-throughput blockchains that require specialized hardware, Bitcoin nodes can typically be run on consumer-grade computers. However, increasing hardware requirements could undermine Bitcoin's value proposition as a decentralized monetary network. Bitcoin advocate Matthew Kratter likened the situation to a parasitical plant overwhelming a tree, suggesting that spam could similarly threaten Bitcoin's structure. Conversely, Bitcoin Core contributor Jameson Lopp supports the uncapped OP_RETURN limit, asserting that filters are ineffective in preventing spam on the network.

data.title: Significant Ethereum Transfer Observed Between Anonymous Addresses
data.description: A notable Ethereum transaction was recorded involving the transfer of 4,141.08 ETH from one anonymous address to another. According to ChainCatcher, this transaction occurred at 09:16 UTC+8. Three minutes later, the receiving address moved 4,141.12 ETH to Lido.

data.title: The Ethereum Foundation established the Quantum Team and set aside $1 million.
data.description: The Ethereum Foundation has officially established a post-quantum team and listed post-quantum security as its highest strategic priority. Led by cryptography engineer Thomas Coratger, researcher Justin Drake stated that leanVM will serve as the cornerstone of this strategy. The Ethereum Foundation has established a $1 million Poseidon Prize to strengthen hash functions in zero-knowledge proof systems, following a $1 million Proximity Prize established last year. Lighthouse and Grandine have already implemented post-quantum consensus development networks, and Prysm is expected to follow suit, launching a bi-weekly developer conference on post-quantum transactions next month, led by Antonio Sanso.

data.title: EU to Ban High-Risk Chinese Vendors from Telecom Networks
data.description:
The EU plans to bar high-risk Chinese vendors from telecoms, solar, and security systems under a Cybersecurity Act update, though member-state approval and industry pushback may delay enforcement.
source: https://catenaa.com/industries/telecom/eu-to-ban-high-risk-chinese-vendors-from-telecom-networks/

data.title: Analyst Says You’re Not Bullish Enough On Ethereum – What Does He Mean?
data.description:
A growing number of analysts believe Ethereum’s current price action is being misunderstood. Although frustration is growing due to Ethereum’s inability to hold above $3,000, some technical analysts are quick to point out that the structure forming beneath the surface tells a very different story. According to one analyst, the real risk right now is not being bullish on Ethereum and trying to short in anticipation of a downside breakout. Related Reading: Crypto Meets Private Banking: UBS Weighs New Offering Higher Lows And A Structure That Keeps Tightening The analyst’s technical view on Ethereum is focused less on short-term momentum and more on the structure developing on the chart, which he argues is even clearer than what is currently visible on Bitcoin’s chart
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/altcoin/analyst-says-youre-not-bullish-enough-on-ethereum-what-does-he-mean/

data.title: The market capitalization of Meme coin PENGUIN has surpassed $170 million, setting a new record high, with a 24-hour increase of 348%.
data.description: According to GMGN market data, the market capitalization of PENGUIN, the Meme coin in the Solana ecosystem, has surpassed $170 million, setting a new all-time high. It is currently trading at $142 million, a 384% increase in the last 24 hours, with a 24-hour trading volume of $149 million. Odaily reminds users that the price of Meme coin is highly volatile; investors are advised to participate with caution.

data.title: CZ: Few strategies can beat "buy and hold".
data.description: CZ wrote on X that he has seen many different trading strategies over the years, but few strategies can beat the simple "buy and hold" approach, which is exactly what he has been doing.

data.title: A whale spent $2.6 million to buy PENGUIN
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale (4wTHK...5LJo) spent 20,575 SOL to buy 20.78 million PENGUIN, worth $2.6 million, and then transferred them to another wallet.

data.title: Yi Lihua: Crypto-friendly policies are gradually being implemented, and the crypto infrastructure bill is highly likely to pass.
data.description: Yi Lihua stated in an article on the X platform that crypto-friendly policies are gradually being implemented, especially with the high probability of the crypto infrastructure bill being passed. This signifies that the crypto industry has ended its past state of being hindered and entered a new phase of a healthy development environment. A large number of outstanding founders and high-quality projects will emerge, while obstacles will be cleared for large-scale participation of US financial institutions in the development of crypto finance. The crypto industry will then be fully integrated into the mainstream financial system.

data.title: Space has released its public sale refund policy: the top 5% of users will only receive a refund of 11% to 21% of their investment.
data.description: Space announced on the X platform that it will allocate an additional $5 million for public sale refunds, with refunds scheduled for January 27th. Furthermore, the team stated that among the 4,677 wallets that participated in the public sale, 80% of users can apply for a 70% refund of their investment, 86% can apply for a 50% refund, and the top 5% of users will receive only 11% to 21% of their investment.

data.title: Ethereum Price Movements Could Trigger Significant Liquidations
data.description: Ethereum's price fluctuations could lead to substantial liquidation events on major centralized exchanges. According to ChainCatcher, data from Coinglass indicates that if Ethereum surpasses $3,089, the cumulative liquidation intensity of short positions on these exchanges will reach $501 million. Conversely, if Ethereum falls below $2,825, the liquidation intensity of long positions will also amount to $501 million.

data.title: Oklahoma Bill Proposes Bitcoin Payments for State Employees and Businesses
data.description: A bill has been introduced by Oklahoma legislator Dusty Deevers to permit state government employees, businesses, and individuals to accept Bitcoin as a form of payment. According to PANews, this proposal aims to integrate cryptocurrency into the state's financial system, reflecting a growing trend of digital currency adoption. The bill's introduction marks a significant step towards embracing Bitcoin in official transactions within Oklahoma.

data.title: Whale Accumulation Is Draining Bitcoin Sell-Side Liquidity
data.description:
According to CryptoQuant, Bitcoin’s sell-side liquidity is tightening as large holders continue withdrawing coins from exchanges at an accelerated pace. The chart highlights a growing imbalance between available exchange supply and sustained demand from accumulator addresses, signaling a structural shift in how Bitcoin is being held and positioned.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/whale-accumulation-is-draining-bitcoin-sell-side-liquidity/

data.title: Smart Money Exit Solana’s Seeker Token after 200% Rally
data.description:
Seeker price has entered a pullback phase. After delivering a sharp 200% post-launch rally earlier this week, SKR is now down nearly 25% over the past 24 hours. That shift becomes all the more important as the buyers driving the move have changed. In our earlier analysis, we showed how smart money absorbed airdrop selling and helped stabilize the price
source: https://beincrypto.com/seeker-price-analysis-after-massive-rally/
